narrative:
Jackson Township has 1,208 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
